title: Module-only library UI
summary: Remove old template types and keep only a single Module entry in the library.

title: JSON netlist database and hierarchy navigation
summary: Persist project as a netlist database with nested netlists and support drill-down / drill-up navigation.

title: Behavioral and structural module typing
summary: Expose explicit type fields and distinguish hierarchical modules clearly in the UI.

title: Group selected nodes into structural submodule
summary: Convert selected nodes into a hierarchical submodule with auto-generated ports and preserved external connectivity.

title: Task checker and continuation workflow
summary: Provide repo-tracked tasks plus a checker script for future AI sessions.

title: Ctrl-restricted multi-selection
summary: Multi-select nodes/connections only when Ctrl key is held, otherwise clear selection on click.

title: Fix persisting selection/ghost dotted lines
summary: Clear dotted lines and port drag ghosts correctly on mouse up.

title: High-performance rendering and Quadtree optimization
summary: Enable smooth editing and navigation of 200k objects using Quadtree and LoD.
